message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Driver rotation: Lea out, Carson becomes Driver">
Task #2 has 9/9 consensus and CI green. Lea's driving phase is complete.

DRIVER ROTATION: Shutting down Lea and Carson. Carson will be respawned as Driver for Tasks #3-5 (HTMX focus mgmt, empty state, inline editing). Lea will be respawned as Reviewer. All other reviewers: stay active and maintain your context.

Please stand by.
</teammate-message>

content.text:
Understood. Standing by for the driver rotation. I will maintain my context and be ready to review Carson's commits on Tasks #3-5. These are HTMX-focused tasks, so I will be paying particular attention to:

- How the server-side handlers change to support new HTMX interactions
- Any new response headers (HX-Trigger, HX-Retarget, etc.) and their correctness
- Focus management implications for the Rust response layer
- Test coverage for the new HTMX fragment responses
- Error handling in any new or modified endpoints

Ready when Carson starts.
